channel.title: Kerntechnik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Kerntechnik

item.title: Study of reliability prediction method and uncertainty analysis of the pump and valve of a floating nuclear power plant
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0103

item.title: Thermal-hydraulic and safety analysis of alternative ceramic fuels in next generation of VVER-1000 reactor
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0082

item.title: Transient thermal analysis for optimal armor material in upgraded mockup for PST using MOOSE Framework
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0077

item.title: Analysis of hypothetical channel flow blockage of a tubular fuel assembly in a 10 MWth nuclear research reactor
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0060

item.title: Preliminary neutronic analyses for annular VHTR with different coated fuel particle designs
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0062

item.title: Improved intelligent model predictive controller for the nuclear power reactor system
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0095

item.title: Monte Carlo simulation of photo-peak efficiency response function and calculation of total efficiency for a NaI (Tl) scintillator detector
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0093

item.title: Calculation and application research on real-time source term diffusion in NPP auxiliary building under accident circumstances
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0096

item.title: Calendar of events – issue 6 of KERN
item.description: Article by Anne Kruessenberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/kern-2024-0138
